task_completion.description: Verify that a taxonomy vocabulary named 'Brands' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vocabulary named 'Brands' on the Drupal Taxonomy administration page (/admin/structure/taxonomy).

task_completion.description: Verify that the terms 'Sony', 'Logitech', and 'Google' exist in the 'Brands' vocabulary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the terms 'Sony', 'Logitech', and 'Google' listed on the terms page for the Brands vocabulary (/admin/structure/taxonomy/manage/brands/overview).

task_completion.description: Verify that a taxonomy term reference field labeled 'Brand' was added to the 'Default' product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a field labeled 'Brand' (machine name field_brand) of type 'Entity reference' or 'Taxonomy term' on the Manage fields page for the Default product type (/admin/commerce/config/product-types/default/edit/fields).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Brand' field is visible in the form display for the 'Default' product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Brand' field in the active (non-disabled) section of the 'Manage form display' tab for the Default product type.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Brand' field is visible in the view display and configured as a label linked to the term.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Brand' field in the active section of the 'Manage display' tab for the Default product type. The format should be set to 'Label' and the settings (gear icon) should indicate it is linked to the referenced entity.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sony' brand is assigned to the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the product edit form or the public-facing product page for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and verify that 'Sony' is selected or displayed in the Brand field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Logitech' brand is assigned to the 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the product edit form or the public-facing product page for 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' and verify that 'Logitech' is selected or displayed in the Brand field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Drupal admin UI in a web browser, not terminal commands (like drush) or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually configured the fields and displays rather than just editing HTML.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Drupal configuration pages (Manage fields, Manage form display, Manage display) being interacted with and saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent edited the actual products to assign the taxonomy terms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Drupal Commerce product edit pages (/admin/commerce/products) with the autocomplete or select widget being used to assign the brands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The vocabulary machine name must be 'brands'. The field machine name must be 'field_brand'. The taxonomy terms to verify are exactly 'Sony', 'Logitech', and 'Google'. The exact product titles to check for tagging are 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (must be tagged 'Sony') and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' (must be tagged 'Logitech').
